review_text: Beautiful spot, clean kitchen and toilets, friendly staff. Pet friendly too.

Stayed a night on a grassy powered site. The park was so clean and tidy. We rang and booked on Good Friday afternoon for that night, took our booking. Highly recommended and will put on my list of places to return.
Great place and amenities, clean and well maintained, reasonable rates.

The most magnificent scenery of the lake and mountains from the unpowered sites! Great facilities too - modern and clean (camp kitchen, toilets/showers, games room, laundry, etc). Close to the pub and cafe. Highly recommend!

I absolutely loved this campground!🏕️🏔️ the kitchen was clean, modern and so beautiful! The bathrooms were also super clean and modern. The campground has a beautiful mountain view.

I became friends with the little goat and I would love to request a goat-friend in her behalf. I am sure she would be so happy and it would mean the world to her. Goats are very social animals, and having a companion would greatly improve her well-being and quality of life.🐐🐐❤️
CAMPING
Camping

Just loved it. The owners are very nice and relaxed, the lake view is fantastic and you can also go swim, just a short hike away. Everything was clean and as you would expect it, plus all the other guests were very nice and laid back aswell. The wifi is okay for doing a little work or streaming a movie, but you shouldn't plan on doing big up- or downloads here. I extended my stay instantly and would always come back.
Great location with spectacular views - peaceful and lots to do around the campsite. Friendly and welcoming service from camp managers/owners.
Great park- excellent value. Lovely new, clean amenities, beautiful views of lake, friendly staff and easy walk to Alpine Inn for a meal and drinks.

Lovely part of the world, the location is second to none! the park grounds are covered in bindi's and are a real problem for walking your pets around, no attempt seems to be made to eliminate this issue, rubbish bins are not located throughout the park and the ones at the amenities were totally full the whole time we were there! Very disappointing in my view!

One of the very best caravan parks I've been to. The owners are amazing and the facilities are well kept and super clean. It's in the middle of khancouban so would be the best place to stay as there are cafes and other attractions near by. The view is beautiful and there's a beloved pet goat to hang out with, Sir Billy the 3rd.
Great little spot
We only called in to hire snow chains, but the people were great. The caravan park looks very well maintained.
Excellent
Hired some ski chains here and the guy was lovely! Showed us how to put on the chains and when to use them when heading up the mountain.
Good customer service. Rooms are worth the price

Beautiful location, management always helpful & pleasant to deal with.|Amenities building and camp kitchen are excellent, clean and  near new. |Hot showers with good pressure always appreciated |Great view no matter where you are located in park.|Nice walk into town.
Great view, friendly service and well priced. Will go again to sit around the fire, enjoy the scenery and relax.
Nice quiet caravan park. Great facilities and location.

What an absolute gem of a park, hosts are wonderful and very helpful. |Amenities & camp kitchen are spotless and look near new. |Best of all we had a double slab drive through site with P & W for $35 p/n.||All this combined with lake and mountain views.
Excellent park.  Great people and reasonably priced. Very clean amenities. The small town offers great food and coffee.

This park is in a great spot easy walk or ride into the little township. Sites are big and grassy. The Ammenities are new and were always clean. There is a HUGE camp kitchen,  activity's area which was again spotless.
The owners are very friendly and their local knowledge is astounding. We loved our stay so much we extended for an extra 3 days.
Thank you for having us!
Great park in a lovely location. Amenities very clean and new. Owners/managers lovely, friendly people who were extremely helpful. Highly recommend staying here, we'll be back.

Lovely views but horrible owner, rude and disrespectful to there customers, had an attitude before even speaking with us!
Would NOT come here if you like to be respected as a human
Can’t believe people like this can work in hospitality(0 hospitality)
Great camp ground and super friendly staff. Facilities (showers, cooking, games) are excellent. Highly recommend. The view over the lake is amazing

So clean, perfect price and everything you need.  Lovely service at check in, and even got great advice on what I wanted to do in Khancoban, loved and enjoyed all your suggestions, thank you!  Beautiful walks nearby.
Wish I had more than one night, next time will spend more time and will stay at KLCP again!

This is a great park and the owner/manager is very knowledgeable, helpful and friendly. The amenities, laundry kitchen etc all in new condition and super clean. Close to town and right on the pondage. Great place to use as a base for Thredbo. The drive is just amazing. If you have a 4x4 no need for chains. 100% recommend!
Beautiful day can see snow on mountain peaks
Great amenities

We had a powered drive through site for a night. Easy parking with near new facilities which are excellent. Grass park and dirt access  rouads no problems. Clean and well kept. It was late April so plenty of room. Guest kitchen looked really impressive, although we cooked for ourselves. Friendly manager who provided useful information about the route through to Jindabyne. In short if you have a big caravan don't try it unless you have a LOT of experience on narrow mountain roads. Small van off season no problems, provided you take it slowly.
Lady in the office was nice, bloke was not that friendly, Park was really nice
Beautiful location...nice and quiet... amenities good cleaned and maintained...owner was very welcoming.

Beautiful views, nice clean and tidy park. Great amenities modern clean and tidy.
Great place to stay pet friendly with large level sites, friendly staff. Very nice walks and bike trails nearby

Engagierte Leute, die wissen, was sie tun. Wunderschön gelegener Campingplatz, idyllisch direkt am See. Spazieren und Joggen ist direkt vom Platz aus möglich. Zu jeder Zeit saubere Amenities, herrliche Duschen mit Wasserdruck, guter Luftabzug in den Duschen und Toiletten. WiFi ist etwas "patchy", aber das wurde uns gleich beim Einchecken gesagt. An der Camp Kitchen gibt es Empfang. Ich kann diesen Campingplatz unbedingt empfehlen!
Great camping with large grass sites right on the bank of the lake. Host's are great and easy to get on with. Amenities blocks are spotless. We'll be back for sure.

Lakeside Caravan Park bietet großzügig dimensionierte Stellplätze auf Rasenflächen an; einige wie unsere powered Site 28 haben auch schattenspendende Bäume. Der Platz und seine Einrichtungen waren gut gepflegt und ruhig. Er bot uns einen sehr angenehmen Aufenthalt.

Not impressed with the cabin, told we would have to pay an extra $250 if it was left untidy, well guess what it’s wasn’t cleaned real well we got the unit keys. The caravan park outside is beautiful pet friendly and kids would have a ball. We won’t be staying in a cabin again not enough cooking things or if we went to use them they are broken or dirty, the stove only has 2 gas burners working, air conditioner has a dead smell about it, cigarette butts everywhere outside on the ground. Blood and hair on the bathroom door window sills filled with dead flies, on the up side shower has awesome pressure and the bed linen is clean the accommodation is cheap enough but come on, even the bin was still fill on the veranda

Good Laid back atmosphere
Good amenities too

Great stay at Khancoban Lakeside such a picturesque spot looking over the lake with mountains in the background . Easy access in and out of a lovely grassed site with our big rig. Very clean and modern ablution block. Camp kitchen very well equipped.

Geweldige plek, campground no. 10!
Prachtig uitzicht op het meer.
Toiletgebouw & Campkitchen zien eruit als nieuw.
Beetje gladde vloer vlak voor entree toilet maar je wordt er voor gewaarschuwd.
